title: Optiplex Intel i7 4770 16GB RAM 512GB M.2 SSD WiFi Windows 11 Desktop PC VenoScorp V100 Computer
features: PC Specs: Equipped with a Intel Core i7 4770 processor (renewed), 16GB DDR3 RAM, and a blazingly quick 512GB M.2 SSD, this pc delivers exceptional speed and power for seamless multitasking and efficient data storage. Pre-installed with Windows 11, this computer ensures you have access to the latest and most advanced software features. Experience the enhanced productivity, seamless multitasking, and cutting-edge security protocols offered by Windows 11

Casing: Cutting-Edge Design and Efficient Cooling - Introducing the Brand New V100 Office case by VenoScorp, a sleek and modern solution that combines a visually appealing design with exceptional cooling capabilities. This case is engineered to provide the perfect balance between style and performance, ensuring your components stay cool even during intense workloads.
Bundle: 1 x Computer , 1 x Wifi Adapter, 1 X Power Cable

Item Condition: This computer comes with brand-new components, ensuring top-notch performance and reliability. The case itself is brand new and sealed, with no marks or signs of wear. From the outside, the system will appear pristine and brand new. Pc will be sent in Original Brand New Packaging. Inside, you will find a Brand New Motherboard, Ram, PSU, and a renewed CPU.

Warranty: Peace of Mind with 1 Year Return to Base Warranty - This full bundle comes with the added assurance of a 1 Year Return to Base Warranty. We stand behind the quality and performance of this bundle, and in the unlikely event of any issues, we offer hassle-free warranty coverage. With the Return to Base Warranty. Our dedicated support team is committed to providing prompt and reliable assistance to ensure your satisfaction.
